body:
Parent issue: #92

Stage: stacking-policy-fix

## Task

Implement a small controlled fix for issue #92. Scope: add explicit planner guidance so when a parent meta-orchestrator continues sequential child implementation work and the prior child produced an open, unmerged PR, the next delegate_issue should set base_pr to that PR unless the next child is intentionally independent. Add a focused regression for the #83 shape: child #1 reports PR: #89 plus SHIP, the parent planner delegates child #2, and the planner/runtime handoff preserves base_pr: "89". Prefer the smallest change that proves the planner emits/carries the stack input. Do not broaden into unrelated adoption metadata behavior unless needed for the regression. Verify with the relevant test command(s) for orchestrator planner/handoff code and note any unavailable checks.

## Base

- base_branch: main

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:92 stage:stacking-policy-fix state:running parent_round:2 -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-96/codex-25263646184`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/97

Added explicit sub-orchestrator planner guidance to stack sequential child work on the prior open child PR via base_pr, documented the policy, and added a #83-shaped regression covering an existing child handoff preserving base_pr "89". Verified with the .agent build and focused orchestrator/envelope tests.

title: Sub-orchestrator: stacking-policy-fix
